experiment_card.research_question: Can the chunked/source-grounded source-span precision method that improved on pilot 003 generalize to a second source excerpt while staying complete, parseable, source-linked, and reviewable?
experiment_card.hypothesis: On a second source excerpt and the same text_judgment_v0 benchmark, the pilot 003 source-span precision contract may preserve complete parseable output and honest exact/approximate/broad/missing labels, while revealing whether the improvement repeats outside the first source.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately authorized live run, create proposal-only export records and evaluate source-span precision, honest exact/approximate/broad/missing support labels, unsupported claims, parseability, output-contract fit, and repeatability value against chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_003 and the first approved source excerpt. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
